svg.text: GitHub Actions · schedule (cron) · 10 automated jobs · commits every day at 06:00–10:15 UTC

g.text: ▶ Tech News Digest · git commit -m "📰 Top AI & dev stories summarized by Gemini AI"
▶ GitHub Trending · git commit -m "🔥 Today's 10 hottest repos archived"
▶ AI Research · git commit -m "🤖 arXiv paper explained in plain English"
▶ Coding Challenge · git commit -m "💡 Daily problem + optimal solution committed"
▶ Tool Spotlight · git commit -m "🛠️ One dev tool worth knowing about"
▶ Prompt of the Day · git commit -m "🎯 Battle-tested LLM prompt curated"
▶ Security Pulse · git commit -m "🔐 Critical CVEs & advisories summarized"
▶ Market Pulse · git commit -m "📊 AI job market & trending skills signal"
▶ Learning Pick · git commit -m "📚 Best tutorial or talk of the day"
▶ Daily Index · git commit -m "🗓️ Master index & archive stats updated"

svg.text: ↻ resets at midnight · loops every 24h · powered by GitHub Actions + Gemini AI
